headline: WeRide WRD 3.0 Unlocks Multi-Chip Platform Compatibility, Driving ADAS Democratization
summary: BEIJING, April 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WeRide (NASDAQ: WRD, HKEX: 0800), a global leader in autonomous driving technology, announced that WeRide Driving (WRD 3.0), its one-stage end-to-end ADAS (Advanced Driver Assistance System) solution, has achieved multi-chip compatibility across computing platforms including NVIDIA DRIVE®, Qualcomm Snapdragon®, and SiEngine StarLight (AD1000).
